title: rohria hispida
intro: Rohria hispida, also known as Rohira, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rohria hispida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. Rohria hispida is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, powder, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
